title: Premium Apartment — Jubilee Hills
overview: Interior transformation of a premium apartment — formal living, master suite, and dining with material-rich finishes.
brief: A family apartment in Jubilee Hills needed a full interior refresh without structural changes — clearer zoning between formal entertaining and private suites, plus storage that disappears into joinery.
approach: We opened sightlines between dining and living while keeping acoustic separation to bedrooms through layered doors and soft finishes. Stone, veneer, and integrated lighting were mock-up approved before procurement.

execution.details: Occupied-building constraints managed with phased works and noise-controlled schedules.

outcome.summary: Phased handover allowed the family to remain in residence — formal zones completed first, suites finished in a final two-week close-out.
